recentTweets.text: Cindy and I are praying for the family members of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, who suddenly passed away after decades of honorable service to our nation, starting with over six years in our Air Force. May he rest in peace and be remembered for his unquestionable love of the men

Every week, my office obtains wins for our constituents, who come to us for answers in their cases with any given federal agency. We are always thrilled to report back with good news.

Our team is privileged to serve the great people of Arizona's Fifth Congressional District. https://t.co/zxYr58DB60

Earlier this week, I joined @broomheadKTAR on the air to commemorate the one-year anniversary of the Working Families Tax Cuts being signed into law. I was pleased to vote for this legislation - the second major tax cuts package in the past decade. https://t.co/Xj0EobgeK0
Happy 100th Birthday, Dave Keaggy! You continue to be an inspiration to everyone around you. Thank you for your service to our nation. https://t.co/4inf7dtKMl

There are a lot of illegitimate entities across the nation being busted for defrauding taxpayers - with many more left to uncover. I applaud the federal government's efforts to hold bad actors accountable to the law and protect taxpayer dollars. 

Local and state governments

I was privileged to attend Coffee & a Mic with Chris Clark of the Queen Creek Chamber this morning to give a federal update on housing, water, and immigration. Thank you, Queen Creek Vice-Mayor Bryan McClure, for being in attendance. https://t.co/mf65KbnrRj

Thank you, Royal Cothrun, for your kindhearted actions in helping an elderly woman in need. We all can learn from your example and assist those around us who are in more vulnerable stages of life. https://t.co/un3HHzamWZ

My office was pleased to welcome the Yin Family from Gilbert for a recent tour of the U.S. Capitol. We hope you all enjoyed your visit.

If you have made plans to come to Washington, D.C., and would like a tour of the Capitol, please reach out to my office. We'd love to help. https://t.co/V9tZPMN1zz

Valley residents, now may be a great time to adopt a four-legged friend desperate to find a forever home if you're looking for a pet. Check out the dogs available at these shelters.
https://t.co/biM00ejmgB
Our continued prayers are with the fire fighters battling the blazes around our state in defense of Arizona communities. Thank you for your dedicated service. https://t.co/9FgM2PtCLt

I appreciated the opportunity to meet with Maricopa County Attorney Rachel Mitchell and others in our law enforcement community earlier today. These individuals are working every day to bring bad actors to justice and make our communities safer.

Since the start of 2026, my office has recovered over $2,100,000 through 508 cases for the people of Arizona’s Fifth Congressional District.

It is my honor to assist the hardworking men and women of the East Valley with their issues with federal agencies.
https://t.co/uarBLiOHrQ https://t.co/2aleEXDCU2

There's still a lot of work left to be done, but tremendous progress has been made to improve the service to our veterans who made sacrifices for this nation's freedoms. Thank you, President @realDonaldTrump & @SecVetAffairs Doug Collins for your efforts. https://t.co/CfOsJfAbvQ

The biggest success of the Working Families Tax Cuts is that we stopped a $4 trillion tax increase from hitting hard-working Americans across the United States. That would have been really bad for the country—maybe the death knell, economically speaking. https://t.co/hHK3KlO3Af

It was my honor to meet with Casey and Meggan Murph in Washington, D.C., last week to discuss their fight to save their ranch and livelihood from egregious government overreach. The Murphs’ fight is an American fight: protecting our ranching heritage, grazing rights, and the https://t.co/Fy9oXMttol

One of my top priorities for my final term in the U.S. House is working with federal, state, and local partners to put Arizona in the best position for a Colorado River agreement. It's  critical for our state - and the nation - that we receive a fair share of the water.

I'm grateful for those who serve our veterans. Recently, my office had the opportunity to assist one of our VA nurses with an issue he had with a federal agency. We were thankful for the favorable result. https://t.co/aBzQSKJ7Pd
Congratulations to Landon Hairston on another great honor. Looking forward to seeing this young man represent our nation on the USA Baseball Collegiate National Team.

Innocent Americans have been harmed because some U.S. cities and states refuse to cooperate with federal authorities to ensure that criminally violent illegal aliens are not released back into unsuspecting communities. I'm outraged at this continuing lack of cooperation, which https://t.co/1ExrOqFQmn

My office was pleased to welcome the Morgan Family from Chandler for a recent tour of the U.S. Capitol.

If you're visiting our nation's capital in the near future, please don't hesitate to reach out to my team for a tour of this historic complex. We'd love to assist. https://t.co/gFa1LNaOYr

We just reached a milestone for my time in Congress - 5,000 completed constituent cases!

This marker shows how intentional and effective my office has been throughout my five terms in the U.S. House of Representatives.

If you have an issue with a federal agency, please do not https://t.co/rxFC0WGwxg

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
